Bash(grep -o 'class="block rounded-lg[^"]*"[^<]*]*>[^<]*<\\/h2>' /tmp/styles.html | head -5; echo "---count---"; grep -o 'beers

' /tmp/styles.html | wc -l; echo "---sample---"; grep -oE ']*>[^<]+|[0-9]+ beers' /tmp/styles.html | head -20)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*next-server*'\\'' -or \($_.CommandLine -like '\\''*next*dev*'\\'' -and $_.CommandLine -notlike '\\''*tapmap-api*'\\''\) } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine')
